word: H8141 - שָׁנֶה - shâneh - shaw-neh' - Whole age

sections.paragraph:
Original: שׁנה שׁנה

Transliteration: shâneh shânâh

Phonetic: shaw-neh'

BDB Definition:

  1. year
    1. as division of time
    2. as measure of time
    3. as indication of age
    4. a lifetime (of years of life)

Origin: from H8138

TWOT entry: 2419a

Part(s) of speech: Noun Feminine
